docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DEAVER, JOSEPH ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DEAVER, JOSEPH

JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT WEAVER - RPT, MARILYN NORMAN - CLERK, GUY DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. & SETTLED FOR STIPULATED JUDGMENT UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 775 GEARY ST, #504, S.F, CA. - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - $2,307.50 RENT - $1,516.50 DAMAGES THRU 11-30-96 - WRIT IS STAYED INDEFINITELY, PENDING PAYMENTS BEING MADE IN TIMELY MANNER - DEF. TO PAY PL. $1,500 BEFORE 11-12-96 - DEF. TO PAY HIS MONTHLY RENT OF $505.50 ON 12-1-96 & ON THE 1ST OF MO. THEREAFTER - DEF. PAYS $100 STARTING 12-15-96 & ON THE 15TH OF THE MO. THEREAFTER UNTIL BAL. PD. IN FULL - IF DEF. PAYS $1200 BY 3-15-96 ON TOTAL BAL. OWING, HE WILL RECEIVE A $200 CREDIT ON THE BAL. - IF DEF. MISSES ANY PMTS, PL.MAY HAVE RELIEF FROM THE STAY BY EXPARTE DECL. & 10 DAY NOTICE TO DEF. - PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. PL. NOT PRESENT AT SETTLEMENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY ROBERT GARCIA. DEF. PRESENT & REPRESENTED BY LEAH STIFT.
